current_wind.description: Moderate to strong wind from NW, with gusts.

wind_info.description: Moderate to strong crosswind from the left.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, a left-to-right wind at 4 o'clock requires a controlled hyzer flip with a stable to overstable disc to manage the crosswind and get a left-turning fade.

fh.shot_strategy: A controlled forehand with a stable to overstable disc will also work here, aiming for a flat release or slight hyzer.

bh.shot_strategy: Champ, with left-to-right wind, a LHBH can be challenging as your natural fade goes with the wind. Consider a controlled forehand instead.

fh.shot_strategy: A controlled forehand with a stable to overstable disc is a reliable option.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, a tailwind like this calls for an understable disc to maximize distance. Aim for a smooth hyzer or flat release.

fh.shot_strategy: An understable forehand can also gain significant distance here.

bh.shot_strategy: Champ, with a tailwind, an understable disc will fly further. Execute a smooth hyzer or flat release.

fh.shot_strategy: An understable forehand is a good option to leverage the tailwind.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, a headwind at 1 o'clock demands an overstable disc to prevent it from turning over. Focus on a clean, firm throw.

fh.shot_strategy: An overstable forehand is also a solid choice for this headwind.
